title: OpenPlanTrace Placement Export
description: Schema for compact downstream placement packets emitted by OpenPlanTrace. This artifact is meant for software that needs page-local coordinates, metric transforms when calibration is reliable, structural geometry, openings, object aggregates, routing hints, and explicit trust gates without consuming the full scanner result.

topologySpans.description: Trusted wall graph spans derived from graph nodes. These are the trimmed/split topology segments consumers should prefer over raw wall centerlines when available.

openingCutouts.description: Anchored openings projected onto this wall centerline. Consumers can subtract these cutouts from the raw wall line when a detector exports a continuous wall through a door or window.

solidSpans.description: Placement-ready solid wall centerline spans after anchored opening cutouts are subtracted. If the detector already split a wall at an opening, the span remains intact and carries adjacentOpeningIds.

placementOmission.description: Structured reason why this wall is omitted from clean placement topology. Null means the wall has not been omitted from coordinate-placement topology by the exporter.

wallGraphRepairCandidateIds.description: Wall graph repair candidate IDs that affect this wall. Consumers should inspect these before applying snap or trim topology corrections to this wall.

linkedWallIds.description: Other wall IDs related to this omission, such as the stronger paired wall body or walls involved in a repair candidate.

repairCandidateIds.description: Wall graph repair candidates responsible for or relevant to this omission.

bodyPolygon.description: Closed page-space wall body footprint ring for this solid span, ordered start-minus-normal, end-minus-normal, end-plus-normal, start-plus-normal, start-minus-normal.

anyOf.description: Metric version of bodyPolygon when calibration is reliable.

alongVector.description: Unit vector from the solid span start point to end point.

normalVector.description: Unit wall-normal vector used to offset the body polygon by half thickness.

sourceWallStartOffsetDrawingUnits.description: Projected span start offset along the source wall centerline in drawing units.

sourceWallEndOffsetDrawingUnits.description: Projected span end offset along the source wall centerline in drawing units.

side.description: Room side relative to the opening normal vector.

hostWallId.description: Primary wall identifier used as the placement anchor when one is available.

anchorWallIds.description: Wall segment ids used to derive the placement reference line. Split-wall openings can include both adjacent wall fragments.

referenceLine.description: Page-space line used as the local placement axis for offsets and direction vectors.

referenceLineMillimeters.description: Metric version of referenceLine when calibration is reliable.

footprintBounds.description: Axis-aligned page-space bounds of the opening footprint across the wall-normal depth.

footprintCorners.description: Four page-space footprint corners ordered start-minus-normal, end-minus-normal, end-plus-normal, start-plus-normal.

startJambLine.description: Wall-normal jamb line at the opening start point.

endJambLine.description: Wall-normal jamb line at the opening end point.

depthDrawingUnits.description: Wall-normal footprint depth in drawing units.

hostWallStartParameter.description: Opening start parameter on referenceLine where 0 is referenceLine.start and 1 is referenceLine.end.

composition.description: Machine-readable child-object makeup for this aggregate, including per-child placement bounds and metric bounds when calibration is reliable.

suppressedObjects.description: Detailed per-object routing suppression records. These explain why a raw object candidate should not be independently consumed and which aggregate obstacle or room-use hint replaces it.

ignoredObjects.description: Detailed object candidates intentionally omitted from routing obstacles, including reason, page and metric bounds, source evidence, and optional suppression or room-use links.

suppressedObjectCandidateIds.description: Object candidate IDs that should not be independently consumed by route/loop/layout tools because a higher-level aggregate already represents them.

ignoredObjectCandidateIds.description: Object candidate IDs that are intentionally not exported as routing obstacles.

readyForCoordinatePlacement.description: True only when the passage's opening placement is internally coherent enough for exact downstream coordinates.

requiresReview.description: True when opening placement, operation, confidence, or related routing evidence requires human review before exact downstream use.

suppressedByAggregateId.description: Object aggregate that replaces or explains this raw child object for routing/loop/layout consumers.

action.description: Recommended downstream action for route/loop/layout consumers.

replacementRoutingObstacleId.description: Routing obstacle ID to consume instead of the child object, when the aggregate is an obstacle.

roomUseHintId.description: Room-use hint ID to consume instead of the child object, when the aggregate is semantic evidence only.

reason.description: Why this object candidate is not exported as a routing obstacle.
